reasoning: Based on comprehensive review of sources through May 2, 2025: Dodik was convicted in February 2025 and banned from politics for 6 years, removing the main advocate for independence referendum. His explicitly stated deadline of "by New Year 2025" for a referendum passed without action. Current discussions focus on constitutional referendum for a new RS Constitution, not independence. Multiple credible sources (Balkan Insight, Guardian, Euronews, Atlantic Council) confirm legal constraints on RS leadership. No evidence found of any official scheduling announcement by any authorized RS entity. With only ~2 months until July 1 deadline, probability is very low.
